assertionResults.title: Recover Collect Shares renders incompatible-shares variant
assertionResults.reason: The page rendered all required incompatible-shares variant content and the paste input accepted typed text.

steps.expected: Recover NSEC screen with incompatible-shares variant content is visible
steps.observed: Header/back link, Recover NSEC title/subtitle, local and pasted loaded share rows, disabled Recover NSEC button, incompatible-shares alert, and both share chips were visible.
Textbox 'Paste share hex' accepted value deadbeefcafebabe1234567890.
